headline: The recruiter-vantage / hiring-org demo — 45 candidates auditioning on 5 shared positions, compared side-by-side — proven live on billion (M228 7/7, recruiter p95 click->ACCESS 1.27s), reads believably (hiring-only, external emails, 1-sim/candidate, gender-matched avatars). 0 platform-repo edits.
